name: MiniMax-VL-01
license: Custom MiniMax Model License (free for most use; platforms with >100M MAU must request a separate license; code under MIT)
archDisplay: Hybrid Lightning+Softmax Attention MoE (80 layers, 32 experts top-2) + 303M-param ViT/MLP vision encoder
note: Vision-language sibling of MiniMax-Text-01, adding a dynamic-resolution (336px-2016px) ViT+MLP encoder atop the same 456B hybrid-attention MoE backbone.
